name: Pathmark Local App Windows
release: v0.6.99 Planning naming and tasklist widget fix
label: Planning naming and tasklist widget fix
release_notes: Renames Organisation to Planning, restores slim seasonal banners to the working modules in a consistent position, quietens the signed-in bar, and fixes Tasklist duplicate Streamlit widget IDs.
notes: Renames Organisation to Planning across the hosted work area, while keeping Finance and Nutrition as the neighbouring modules.
Restores the soft seasonal banner to Planning, Finance and Nutrition in a consistent, slim position below the compact readiness status.
Makes the signed-in/access bar quieter by replacing large account cards with small chips.
Fixes Tasklist duplicate Streamlit widget IDs by adding explicit keys to the tasklist name, notes, download and export controls.
Adds explicit keys to Spending Plan Projections controls to reduce duplicate widget errors when Streamlit renders hidden tabs.
release_name: Planning naming and tasklist widget fix
